name: Baidu Qianfan
description: Baidus Model-as-a-Service platform (千帆) for ERNIE and 77+ models, offering ModelBuilder, AppBuilder and agent workflows.

seo.title: Baidu Qianfan — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Baidu Qianfan: Baidus Model-as-a-Service platform (千帆) for ERNIE and 77+ models, offering ModelBuilder, AppBuilder and agent workflows.

when_to_use: Accessing ERNIE Bot and 77+ models through one unified API
Building AI agents with AppBuilder for enterprise workflows
Running RAG pipelines with Baidu's vector and retrieval tools
Fine-tuning ERNIE models on proprietary Chinese datasets
Deploying LLM apps via ModelBuilder with serverless scaling

review.verdict: One-stop MaaS for teams already committed to Baidu Cloud in China.
review.best_for: Chinese enterprises standardizing on Baidu Cloud for GenAI workloads
review.not_for: Global teams unwilling to adopt Baidu Cloud as primary provider
